declared_bridge_fiber.definition: Declared current-family/common-refinement transport-frame realizations generated by the same-label line lift and projecting to the selected public quark frame class f_P.
declared_bridge_fiber.name: R_decl(f_P)

declared_bridge_fiber_invariance_theorem.statement: Let R_decl(f_P) be the set of declared current-family/common-refinement transport-frame realizations generated by the same-label line lift and projecting to the selected public quark frame class f_P. For any r,r' in R_decl(f_P), the ordered same-label projectors carry the same labels ['f1', 'f2', 'f3'], the same-label transport partial isometries fix the same phase-locked source/target frame columns up to independent per-label phases, and refinement functoriality plus current-family common-refinement invariance identify every declared presentation with that same labeled transport-frame class. Therefore there exist diagonal D_u,D_d in U(1)^3 such that (U_u^L(r'),U_d^L(r'),V_CKM(r')) = (U_u^L(r) D_u, U_d^L(r) D_d, D_u^dagger V_CKM(r) D_d), so [sigma_id(r'),canonical_token(r'),U_u^L(r'),U_d^L(r'),V_CKM(r'),I_CKM(r')] = [sigma_id(r),canonical_token(r),U_u^L(r) D_u,U_d^L(r) D_d,D_u^dagger V_CKM(r) D_d,I_CKM(r)] in Sigma_ud^phys. Since the strengthened restricted lift attaches one exact sigma datum to that declared same-label class, (sigma_seed_ud, eta_ud, sigma_u, sigma_d)(r') = (sigma_seed_ud, eta_ud, sigma_u, sigma_d)(r).

notes: This theorem closes the direct public route rather than the upstream generation-bundle route.
It is a descent theorem on the selected public frame class only; it does not claim a global classification of all quark frame classes.
The selected exact sigma datum is the same one already emitted on the closed local transport-frame chain.

phase_quotient_argument.carrier_compatibility: This is exactly the defining equivalence relation of Sigma_ud^phys.
phase_quotient_argument.conclusion: The emitted class is independent of the representative eigenvector phases.
phase_quotient_argument.phase_ambiguity: Changing the unit eigenvector representatives multiplies F0 and F1 on the right by diagonal phases D_u,D_d.

proof_skeleton.statement: The restricted sector-attached lift already provides a section over the explicit same-label common-refinement transport-frame class generated by the line lift.
Changing unit eigenvector representatives multiplies the source and target frames on the right by diagonal phases only, and this is exactly the defining quotient relation of Sigma_ud^phys.
The restricted strengthened lift already attaches the unique exact sigma datum to that emitted Sigma_ud^phys class on the realized section.

Any declared realization in the selected same-label bridge fiber is reconstructed from the same ordered labels and same-label transport partial isometries, so any two declared realizations differ only by diagonal rephasing.
The defining quotient of Sigma_ud^phys kills that rephasing freedom, so the sigma element and the attached exact sigma datum are constant on the selected declared bridge fiber and factor through f_P.

realized_transport_frame_section_uniquen.section_domain: the explicit common-refinement transport-frame class generated by the same-label line lift
realized_transport_frame_section_uniquen.uniqueness_reason: On the selected public class, the declared same-label bridge fiber is generated by one labeled common-refinement transport-frame class from the same-label line lift. Ordered labels and canonical phase-locking leave only independent diagonal rephasing on the source and target frames.

theorem_statement: Let f_P be the physical quark frame class selected by P, represented on the realized quark lane by the explicit same-label common-refinement transport-frame class [F0^dagger F1]. For any two declared current-family/common-refinement transport-frame realizations r,r' in the selected same-label bridge fiber R_decl(f_P), the emitted Sigma_ud^phys element and attached exact physical sigma datum (sigma_seed_ud, eta_ud, sigma_u, sigma_d) agree. Equivalently, the exact sigma readout is constant on R_decl(f_P) and descends uniquely to a target-free public datum on the physical quark frame class selected by P.
why_sufficient: Once this descent holds, the theorem-grade physical sigma datum is intrinsic public data on the selected physical quark frame class. The affine mean law then emits the absolute sector scales algebraically, and the already-closed exact forward construction lifts from the local transport-frame representative to the public selected class.
